candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; identical to Net Sales and preferred candidate list includes it.
Balance-sheet accrual, not the income-statement top-line revenue.
Liability/deferred revenue, not reported sales/revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the direct income-statement revenue line.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and best match for direct production/service costs.
Also a valid COGS label, but appears redundant with Cost of goods sold.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Component of COGS, not the full COGS amount.
Likely component/placeholder, not the main COGS total.

variables.notes: Preferred the direct reported COGS row over the duplicate/alias 'Cost of revenues/COGS'.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row exists, but preview shows it mostly empty; per rule, include it plus populated overhead buckets for coverage.
Clear SG&A component above operating profit.
Clear SG&A component above operating profit.
Overhead-type operating expense bucket above operating profit.
Dedicated R&D expense above EBIT; included in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Related R&D line, but appears more like a broader/alternative subtotal than the primary dedicated line.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|double. Explicit SG&A row exists but appears unpopulated in preview, so included it along with populated overhead components per rule. Included 'Research and development' in XSGA because PROF uses XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD and the R&D line is separately reported above operating profit.

candidates.why: Best dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit.
Another R&D-related line, but likely broader/alternative subtotal; less preferred than the primary line.
Capitalization offset, not the core R&D expense line.
Only depreciation component, not total R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected the dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line. Same row is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD excludes R&D.

candidates.why: Best recurring finance-cost line with broad year coverage; preferable here to avoid missing years from partial components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but incomplete on its own.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate-style disclosure, not preferred over main finance-expense line.

variables.notes: Used the recurring finance-cost line with best consistency across years. Avoided combining it with component rows to prevent double counting.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Malformed combined line including liabilities; not book equity.
Balance-sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Chosen to exclude non-controlling interests from BE, consistent with PROF denominator rule.

candidates.why: Direct non-controlling interest line on the balance sheet.
Equivalent NCI label and useful as alternate across years.
Income-statement attribution, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Income-statement attribution total, not balance-sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: Provided both balance-sheet NCI labels as priority alternatives for year-to-year label variation.
